data.title: Foresite Named 2026 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year for North America
data.description: Foresite Cybersecurity, based in OVERLAND PARK, Kan., was recently honored as the 2026 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year for North America. The organization's exemplary leadership in practitioner-governed, AI-enhanced security operations was recognized with this prestigious award. This acknowledgment underscores Foresite Cybersecurity's commitment to excellence in the field, showcasing their dedication to cutting-edge practices. This accolade marks a significant achievement, showcasing the company's success and expertise in the industry.

data.title: Harness Wins 2026 Google Cloud Technology Partner of the Year Award for DevOps
data.description: Today in San Francisco, on April 21, 2026, Harness, a prominent AI Software Delivery Platform™ company, disclosed their achievement of being honored with the prestigious 2026 Google Cloud Technology Partner of the Year Award. This award showcases the growing collaboration between Harness and Google Cloud in the realm of agentic AI innovation.

data.title: Franco-Nevada to Release First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Toronto-based Franco-Nevada Corporation shared plans to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results. The results are set to be released on May 12th after market close, followed by a conference call scheduled for May 13th at 8:00 am Eastern Time. Investors and stakeholders can participate in the call using the toll-free dial-in number: 1-888-510-2154.

data.title: Neat Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Google Workspace: Innovation
data.description: Neat, a company based in Oslo, Norway, has been honored with the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Google Workspace: Innovation. This recognition highlights Neat's success within the Google Cloud environment, notably due to its recent collaboration with Google Meet. By combining forces, they have assisted mutual clients in connecting dispersed teams through user-friendly video technology that is both efficient and easy to operate. Neat's dedication to delivering exceptional performance is underscored by this prestigious award.

data.title: Insight Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Global Workplace AI Transformation
data.description: Insight Enterprises, a Solutions Integrator and Google Cloud Premier Partner (NASDAQ: NSIT), was awarded the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Global Workplace AI Transformation. This recognition comes after being a Google Cloud Premier Partner for a decade. Insight has excelled in assisting clients in utilizing the Google Cloud AI portfolio to create innovative solutions. Their expertise in this area has been instrumental in helping organizations to conquer challenges in the evolving workplace environment.

data.title: Exabeam Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security: Analytics & Operations
data.description: Exabeam, a company based in Broomfield, Colorado, was recently awarded the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Security: Analytics & Operations. The award acknowledges Exabeam's success within the Google Cloud ecosystem in enhancing security operations. By leveraging behavior intelligence, AI-driven analytics, and agent-based workflows, Exabeam assists mutual clients in boosting their security processes. The recognition highlights the company's efforts in improving detection, investigation, and response capabilities.

data.title: AMI Firmware Validated for Arm AGI CPU Platforms, Accelerating Infrastructure Deployment
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 21, 2026, AMI, a leading provider of AI compute firmware, revealed that the Aptio® V UEFI/BIOS Firmware and MegaRAC OneTree™ BMC Firmware have been officially validated and are now accessible for Arm® AGI CPU platforms. This makes AMI the pioneer firmware vendor to offer these solutions for the said platforms. The development marks a significant milestone in the integration of AI technology into computer systems.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Trade Sideways On US-Iran Meeting Delay
data.description: Bitcoin is currently valued at $75,616.60, maintaining stability above $75,000 amid impending U.S.-Iran talks. Other cryptocurrencies include Ethereum at $2,307.95, Solana at $85.35, XRP at $1.42, Dogecoin at $0.09440, and Shiba Inu at $0.056023. Coinglass data reports liquidation of 114,658 traders in the last 24 hours, totaling $286.09 million losses. SoSoValue data shows $238.4 million inflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs on Monday, with Ethereum ETFs seeing $67.8 million inflows. Top gainers in the past day are RaveDAO, MemeCore, and JUST. Deutsche Bank notes a resurgence in U.S. crypto adoption, speculating on Bitcoin's potential rise to $120,000.

data.title: WOMEN FOR RILEY PRESENTS "PASSPORT TO PARIS" PROM AT THE CHILDREN'S MUSEUM OF INDIANAPOLIS
data.description: In Indianapolis on April 21, 2026, Women for Riley revealed that the yearly Riley Prom for patients of the Pediatric Hematology, Oncology, and Stem Cell Transplant Center is set for Friday, May 1, 2026, at 6:30 PM EST. An innovation for this year, the event will now be hosted at a new location...
